     1→---
     2→name: replit-migration-guardrails
     3→description: Rules for migrating external projects (Lovable, Base44, v0/Vercel, Bolt) to Replit. Use Replit's built-in DB, auth, secrets, and integrations — not Supabase / Firebase / cookie-session / raw API keys. Base44 imports get a call-by-call map in `.local/secondary_skills/replit-migration-guardrails/references/base44.md`; v0/Vercel imports get a Next.js migration guide in `.local/secondary_skills/replit-migration-guardrails/references/vercel.md`.
     4→---
     5→
     6→# Migration guardrails
     7→
     8→Rules for migrating Lovable / Base44 / v0 / Vercel / Bolt imports to
     9→Replit. Base44 imports get a call-by-call map in
    10→`.local/secondary_skills/replit-migration-guardrails/references/base44.md`;
    11→v0/Vercel imports get a Next.js migration guide in
    12→`.local/secondary_skills/replit-migration-guardrails/references/vercel.md`.
    13→Security reasoning:
    14→<https://blog.replit.com/defense-in-depth-how-replit-secures-every-layer-of-the-vibe-coding-stack>.
    15→
    16→## Rules
    17→
    18→1. **Database:** Replit PostgreSQL via the `javascript_database`
    19→   blueprint. Not Supabase, Firebase, PlanetScale, etc. Reason: the
    20→   blog post's frontend/backend separation argument — RLS-only apps
    21→   are the vulnerability class Replit is built to avoid. Schema in
    22→   `shared/schema.ts`, `IStorage` in `server/storage.ts`, routes
    23→   under `/api/*`, then `npm run db:push`.
    24→
    25→2. **Auth:** `javascript_log_in_with_replit` blueprint (Replit Auth).
    26→   If the user explicitly asks for Clerk, use the `clerk-auth` skill.
    27→   Never hand-roll cookie sessions or design login/signup/reset forms.
    28→   Don't use the strings "Replit" or "Replit Auth" in UI; just "Log in".
    29→
    30→3. **Secrets:** Live in Replit's secret store. Use the
    31→   `environment-secrets` skill's `ask_secrets` tool to request
    32→   user-supplied keys, and `check_secrets` to see what's already
    33→   set. Never paste keys into code or `.env.*`. Never expose via
    34→   `VITE_*` (that ships to the browser). Scrape nothing from the
    35→   imported `.env`; re-request through `ask_secrets`.
    36→
    37→4. **Integrations:** For AI, use **AI Integrations** via the
    38→   `integrations` skill (OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini env vars
    39→   auto-provisioned, no key from the user). For object storage, use
    40→   `javascript_object_storage`. For payments, `javascript_stripe` /
    41→   `javascript_paypal`. For email / SMS / Slack / Notion / etc.,
    42→   search the `integrations` skill first. Only fall back to
    43→   `ask_secrets` if no integration exists. Never call external APIs
    44→   from the browser.
    45→
    46→## Talk to the user like a non-technical user
    47→
    48→Keep user-facing messages short. Just tell them a migration is
    49→running; no enumeration of what surfaces were found, no step-by-step
    50→plan, no tool / library / file / blueprint names.
    51→
    52→One-liner format: what the app is, that you're migrating it, rough
    53→time, whether they need to do anything (ideally "nothing right now").
    54→
    55→The per-source reference in `references/` has a filled-in template.
    56→

Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of .local/skills/package-management/SKILL.md
     1→---
     2→name: package-management
     3→description: Install and manage language packages, system dependencies, and programming language runtimes.
     4→---
     5→
     6→# Package Management Skill
     7→
     8→Manage project dependencies and programming language runtimes. Use this skill instead of running shell commands like `npm install`, `pip install`, or `apt install`.
     9→
    10→## When to Use
    11→
    12→Use this skill when you need to:
    13→
    14→- Install language-specific packages (npm, pip, cargo, etc.)
    15→- Install system-level dependencies (ffmpeg, jq, imagemagick, etc.)
    16→- Install programming language runtimes (Python, Node.js, etc.)
    17→- Remove packages from the project
    18→- Check available versions of a programming language
    19→
    20→## When NOT to Use
    21→
    22→- Searching for available packages (use web search instead)
    23→- Configuring package settings (edit config files directly)
    24→- Running package scripts (use bash tool)
    25→
    26→## Modules (Replit Terminology)
    27→
    28→"Modules" is a Replit-specific term for language toolchains that can be installed into the NixOS environment. Use `listAvailableModules()` to see what's available.
    29→
    30→**Installation priority order:**
    31→
    32→1. Modules via this skill (preferred)
    33→2. Nix system dependencies via `installSystemDependencies()`
    34→3. Language package managers (pip, npm, cargo, etc.) via `installLanguagePackages()`
    35→
    36→If confused about package installation in Nix or language package managers, use web search.
    37→
    38→If a package install fails with HTTP 403 from `package-firewall.replit.local`, treat it as a likely security block and do not retry the same install.
    39→
    40→**After installing a module:**
    41→
    42→- Update `.gitignore` with the language's standard ignore patterns
    43→- Never add Replit config files to `.gitignore`
    44→
    45→**After removing a module:**
    46→
    47→- Consider removing any corresponding workflows that depend on it
    48→
    49→## Available Functions
    50→
    51→### listAvailableModules(langName=None)
    52→
    53→List available language toolchains that can be installed.
    54→
    55→**Parameters:**
    56→
    57→- `langName` (str, optional): Language name to filter by (e.g., "python", "nodejs", "rust"). If not provided, returns all available modules.
    58→
    59→**Returns:** Dict with `success`, `message`, `langName`, and `modules` list
    60→
    61→Each module contains: id, name, version, description
    62→
    63→**Example:**
    64→
    65→```javascript
    66→// List all available modules
    67→const modules = await listAvailableModules();
    68→// Returns: {modules: [{id: "python-3.11", ...}, {id: "nodejs-20", ...}, ...]}
    69→
    70→// Find available Python versions
    71→const pythonModules = await listAvailableModules({ langName: "python" });
    72→// Returns: {modules: [{id: "python-3.11", name: "Python", version: "3.11", ...}, ...]}
    73→
    74→// Find available Node.js versions
    75→const nodeModules = await listAvailableModules({ langName: "nodejs" });
    76→```
    77→
    78→### installProgrammingLanguage(language)
    79→
    80→Install a programming language runtime and its package manager.
    81→
    82→**Parameters:**
    83→
    84→- `language` (str, required): Language identifier like "python-3.11", "nodejs-20"
    85→
    86→**Returns:** Dict with `success`, `message`, `language`, and `installedModuleId` keys
    87→
    88→**Example:**
    89→
    90→```javascript
    91→// First, check available versions
    92→const modules = await listAvailableModules({ langName: "python" });
    93→console.log(modules);  // See available Python versions
    94→
    95→// Install specific version
    96→const result = await installProgrammingLanguage({ language: "python-3.11" });
    97→
    98→// Install Node.js 20
    99→const result2 = await installProgrammingLanguage({ language: "nodejs-20" });
   100→```
   101→
   102→### uninstallProgrammingLanguage(moduleId)
   103→
   104→Remove an installed programming language runtime.
   105→
   106→**Parameters:**
   107→
   108→- `moduleId` (str, required): Module ID from `listAvailableModules`
   109→
   110→**Returns:** Dict with `success`, `message`, `moduleId`, and `wasInstalled`
   111→
   112→**Example:**
   113→
   114→```javascript
   115→// Remove Python 3.10
   116→const result = await uninstallProgrammingLanguage({ moduleId: "python-3.10" });
   117→```
   118→
   119→### installLanguagePackages(language, packages)
   120→
   121→Install language-specific packages like npm, pip, or cargo packages.
   122→
   123→**Parameters:**
   124→
   125→- `language` (str, required): Programming language: "nodejs", "python", "bun", "go", "rust"
   126→- `packages` (list[str], required): List of packages to install
   127→
   128→**Returns:** Dict with `success`, `message`, `packages`, and `output` keys
   129→
   130→**Example:**
   131→
   132→```javascript
   133→// Install npm packages
   134→const result = await installLanguagePackages({
   135→    language: "nodejs",
   136→    packages: ["express", "lodash"]
   137→});
   138→console.log(result.message);
   139→
   140→// Install pip packages
   141→const result2 = await installLanguagePackages({
   142→    language: "python",
   143→    packages: ["requests", "flask"]
   144→});
   145→```
   146→
   147→**IMPORTANT — required parameter rules:**
   148→
   149→- `language` is **required** — you must always include it
   150→- Valid language values: `"nodejs"`, `"python"`, `"bun"`, `"go"`, `"rust"`
   151→  - Use `"nodejs"` for JavaScript/TypeScript projects — NEVER use `"js"`, `"node"`, or `"javascript"`
   152→  - Use `"python"` for Python projects — NEVER use `"py"` or `"pip"`
   153→- `packages` must be an **array of strings** — NEVER a single string, NEVER an array of objects
   154→  - Correct: `packages: ["express"]`
   155→  - Wrong: `packages: "express"`
   156→  - Wrong: `packages: [{name: "express"}]`
   157→
   158→### uninstallLanguagePackages(language, packages)
   159→
   160→Remove language-specific packages.
   161→
   162→**Parameters:**
   163→
   164→- `language` (str, required): Programming language
   165→- `packages` (list[str], required): List of packages to uninstall
   166→
   167→**Returns:** Dict with `success`, `message`, and `packages` keys
   168→
   169→**Example:**
   170→
   171→```javascript
   172→const result = await uninstallLanguagePackages({
   173→    language: "nodejs",
   174→    packages: ["lodash"]
   175→});
   176→```
   177→
   178→### installSystemDependencies(packages)
   179→
   180→Install system-level dependencies via Nix.
   181→
   182→**Parameters:**
   183→
   184→- `packages` (list[str], required): Nixpkgs attribute paths (NOT apt package names)
   185→
   186→**Returns:** Dict with `success`, `message`, and `packages` keys
   187→
   188→**Important:** Use Nix package names, not apt/debian names:
   189→
   190→- X11 libraries need 'xorg.' prefix: `xorg.libxcb`, `xorg.libX11`
   191→- `ca-certificates` is `cacert` in Nix
   192→- `libxcb` is `xorg.libxcb` in Nix
   193→
   194→**Example:**
   195→
   196→```javascript
   197→// Install system dependencies
   198→const result = await installSystemDependencies({
   199→    packages: ["jq", "ffmpeg", "imagemagick"]
   200→});
   201→
   202→// Install X11 libraries (note the xorg. prefix)
   203→const result2 = await installSystemDependencies({
   204→    packages: ["xorg.libxcb", "xorg.libX11"]
   205→});
   206→```
   207→
   208→### uninstallSystemDependencies(packages)
   209→
   210→Remove system-level dependencies.
   211→
   212→**Parameters:**
   213→
   214→- `packages` (list[str], required): Nixpkgs attribute paths to uninstall
   215→
   216→**Returns:** Dict with `success`, `message`, and `packages` keys
   217→
   218→**Example:**
   219→
   220→```javascript
   221→const result = await uninstallSystemDependencies({ packages: ["jq"] });
   222→```
   223→
   224→## Best Practices
   225→
   226→1. **Use language packages for project dependencies**: These are tracked in package files (package.json, requirements.txt)
   227→2. **Use system dependencies for OS-level tools**: Things like ffmpeg, imagemagick, or native libraries
   228→3. **Use Nix package names**: Not apt/debian names. Check nixpkgs for correct names
   229→4. **Install language runtimes when needed**: If `python` or `node` commands fail, install the runtime first
   230→5. **Check versions first**: Use `listAvailableModules` before `installProgrammingLanguage`
   231→
   232→## Example Workflow
   233→
   234→```javascript
   235→// Check available Python versions
   236→const modules = await listAvailableModules({ langName: "python" });
   237→console.log(modules);
   238→
   239→// Set up a Python Flask project
   240→await installProgrammingLanguage({ language: "python-3.11" });
   241→await installLanguagePackages({
   242→    language: "python",
   243→    packages: ["flask", "gunicorn", "sqlalchemy"]
   244→});
   245→
   246→// Set up a Node.js project with native dependencies
   247→await installProgrammingLanguage({ language: "nodejs-20" });
   248→await installLanguagePackages({
   249→    language: "nodejs",
   250→    packages: ["sharp", "canvas"]
   251→});
   252→await installSystemDependencies({
   253→    packages: ["pkg-config", "cairo", "pango", "libjpeg"]
   254→});
   255→
   256→// Clean up old language version
   257→await uninstallProgrammingLanguage({ moduleId: "python-3.10" });
   258→```
   259→
   260→## Automatic Behaviors
   261→
   262→- Installing packages automatically creates/updates project files (package.json, requirements.txt, etc.)
   263→- Package installations reboot all workflows to pick up new dependencies
   264→- Language runtime installations include popular package managers (pip, npm, etc.)
   265→

                <Button Grid.Column="7" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding PrintPayrollCommand}" Margin="4,0"
                        IsEnabled="{Binding SelectedEmployee, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Printer" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="طباعة الرواتب"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="8" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding EvaluateTherapistCommand}" Margin="4,0"
                        IsEnabled="{Binding SelectedEmployee, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ChartBar" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="تقييم"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- ══════ MAIN CONTENT ══════ -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1" ColumnDefinitions="320,*" Margin="16">

            <!-- ── Left: Employee List ── -->
            <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Column="0" Padding="0" Margin="0,0,8,0">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}" CornerRadius="8,8,0,0" Padding="12,10">
                        <TextBlock Text="قائمة الموظفين" Foreground="White" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="14"/>
                    </Border>
                    <ListBox Grid.Row="1" ItemsSource="{Binding Employees}"
                             SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedEmployee}"
                             ScrollViewer.VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Padding="10,8">
                                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                                        <!-- Avatar -->
                                        <Border Grid.Column="0" Width="40" Height="40" CornerRadius="20"
                                                Background="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}"
                                                Margin="0,0,10,0" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Name[0]}"
                                                       Foreground="White" HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                                                       VerticalAlignment="Center" FontSize="16" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                                        </Border>
                                        <!-- Info -->
                                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" VerticalAlignment="Center" Spacing="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Name}" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Position}" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="12"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding EmployeeNumber}" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <!-- Status -->
                                        <Border Grid.Column="2" CornerRadius="4" Padding="6,2" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                                            <Border.Background>
                                                <SolidColorBrush Color="#E8F5E9"/>
                                            </Border.Background>
                                            <TextBlock Text="نشط" FontSize="11" Foreground="#2E7D32"/>
                                        </Border>
                                    </Grid>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                    </ListBox>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- ── Right: Details Tabs ── -->
            <Grid Grid.Column="1" RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
                <!-- Employee Card summary when selected -->
                <Border Grid.Row="0" Classes="Card" Margin="0,0,0,8"
                        IsVisible="{Binding SelectedEmployee, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}">
                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                        <Border Grid.Column="0" Width="56" Height="56" CornerRadius="28"
                                Background="{StaticResource AccentBrush}" Margin="0,0,14,0">
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.Name[0]}"
                                       Foreground="White" HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Center" FontSize="22" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                        </Border>
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" VerticalAlignment="Center" Spacing="3">
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.Name}" FontSize="18" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="10">
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.Position}" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="|" Foreground="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.Department}" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="|" Foreground="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.Phone}" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="10">
                                <TextBlock Text="رقم الهوية:" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.NationalId}" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="|" Foreground="{StaticResource BorderBrush}" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="الراتب الأساسي:" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.BaseSalary, StringFormat='{}{0:N0} ر.س'}" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="{StaticResource SuccessBrush}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="2" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                            <Button Command="{Binding OpenContractCommand}" ToolTip.Tip="فتح العقد"
                                    IsEnabled="{Binding SelectedEmployee.ContractPath, Converter={x:Static StringConverters.IsNotNullOrEmpty}}">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileDocument" Width="18"/>
                            </Button>
                            <Button Command="{Binding OpenCvCommand}" ToolTip.Tip="فتح السيرة الذاتية"
                                    IsEnabled="{Binding SelectedEmployee.CvPath, Converter={x:Static StringConverters.IsNotNullOrEmpty}}">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AccountDetails" Width="18"/>
                            </Button>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>

                <!-- Tabs -->
                <TabControl Grid.Row="1" SelectedIndex="{Binding SelectedTab}">
                    <!-- ─ Tab 1: Full Profile ─ -->
                    <TabItem>
                        <TabItem.Header>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AccountCircle" Width="16"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="الملف الشخصي"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </TabItem.Header>
                        <ScrollViewer>
                            <StackPanel Spacing="12" IsVisible="{Binding SelectedEmployee, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}">
                                <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,*" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch">
                                    <Border Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="0" Classes="Card" Margin="0,0,6,6">
                                        <StackPanel Spacing="4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="رقم الموظف" Classes="Label" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.EmployeeNumber}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                    <Border Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="0" Classes="Card" Margin="6,0,0,6">
                                        <StackPanel Spacing="4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="رقم الهوية" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.NationalId}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                    <Border Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="1" Classes="Card" Margin="0,0,6,6">
                                        <StackPanel Spacing="4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="الدور" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.Role}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                    <Border Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="1" Classes="Card" Margin="6,0,0,6">
                                        <StackPanel Spacing="4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="القسم" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.Department}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                    <Border Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="2" Classes="Card" Margin="0,0,6,6">
                                        <StackPanel Spacing="4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="البريد الإلكتروني" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.Email}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                    <Border Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="2" Classes="Card" Margin="6,0,0,6">
                                        <StackPanel Spacing="4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="تاريخ الالتحاق" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.JoinDate, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                    <Border Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="3" Classes="Card" Margin="0,0,6,6">
                                        <StackPanel Spacing="4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="جهة الاتصال الطارئة" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.EmergencyContact}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                    <Border Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="3" Classes="Card" Margin="6,0,0,6">
                                        <StackPanel Spacing="4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="هاتف الطوارئ" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.EmergencyPhone}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                    <Border Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="4" Classes="Card" Margin="0,0,0,6">
                                        <StackPanel Spacing="4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="العنوان" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.Address}" FontWeight="SemiBold" TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </Grid>
                                <Border Classes="Card">
                                    <StackPanel Spacing="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="ملاحظات" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.Notes}" TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </ScrollViewer>
                    </TabItem>

                    <!-- ─ Tab 2: Payroll ─ -->
                    <TabItem>
                        <TabItem.Header>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="CashMultiple" Width="16"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="الرواتب والأجور"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </TabItem.Header>
                        <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
                            <!-- Payroll Summary Cards -->
                            <Border Grid.Row="0" Classes="Card" Margin="0,0,0,8"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding SelectedPayroll, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}">
                                <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,*,*,*,*,*">
                                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="الراتب الأساسي" FontSize="11" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedPayroll.BaseSalary, StringFormat='{}{0:N0}'}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="15" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="البدلات" FontSize="11" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                        <TextBlock FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="15" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Foreground="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}">
                                            <TextBlock.Text>
                                                <MultiBinding StringFormat="{}{0:N0}">
                                                    <Binding Path="SelectedPayroll.HousingAllowance"/>
                                                </MultiBinding>
                                            </TextBlock.Text>
                                        </TextBlock>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="2" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="الحوافز" FontSize="11" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedPayroll.Incentives, StringFormat='{}{0:N0}'}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="15" Foreground="{StaticResource SuccessBrush}" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="3" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="الخصومات" FontSize="11" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedPayroll.Deductions, StringFormat='{}{0:N0}'}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="15" Foreground="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="4" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="خصم الغياب" FontSize="11" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedPayroll.AbsenceDeduction, StringFormat='{}{0:N0}'}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="15" Foreground="{StaticResource WarningBrush}" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="5" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="الصافي" FontSize="11" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedPayroll.NetSalary, StringFormat='{}{0:N0} ر.س'}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16" Foreground="{StaticResource AccentBrush}" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Grid>
                            </Border>
                            <Border Grid.Row="1" Classes="Card" Padding="0">
                                <Grid RowDefinitions="*,Auto">
                                    <DataGrid Grid.Row="0" ItemsSource="{Binding Payrolls}"
                                              SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedPayroll}"
                                              IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                                        <DataGrid.Columns>
                                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="الشهر" Binding="{Binding MonthName}" Width="120"/>
                                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="الراتب الأساسي" Binding="{Binding BaseSalary, StringFormat='{}{0:N0}'}" Width="110"/>
                                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="بدل سكن" Binding="{Binding HousingAllowance, StringFormat='{}{0:N0}'}" Width="90"/>
                                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="بدل نقل" Binding="{Binding TransportAllowance, StringFormat='{}{0:N0}'}" Width="90"/>
                                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="حوافز" Binding="{Binding Incentives, StringFormat='{}{0:N0}'}" Width="80"/>
                                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="خصومات" Binding="{Binding Deductions, StringFormat='{}{0:N0}'}" Width="80"/>
                                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="أيام غياب" Binding="{Binding AbsenceDays}" Width="80"/>
                                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="خصم غياب" Binding="{Binding AbsenceDeduction, StringFormat='{}{0:N0}'}" Width="90"/>
                                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="الصافي" Binding="{Binding NetSalary, StringFormat='{}{0:N0} ر.س'}" Width="120"/>
                                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="الحالة" Binding="{Binding Status}" Width="80"/>
                                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="ملاحظات" Binding="{Binding Notes}" Width="*"/>
                                        </DataGrid.Columns>
                                    </DataGrid>
                                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8" Margin="8">
                                        <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding MarkPayrollPaidCommand}"
                                                IsEnabled="{Binding SelectedPayroll, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}">
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="CheckCircle" Width="16"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="تأكيد الصرف"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                        </Button>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Grid>
                            </Border>
                        </Grid>
                    </TabItem>

                    <!-- ─ Tab 3: Attendance ─ -->
                    <TabItem>
                        <TabItem.Header>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="CalendarCheck" Width="16"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="الحضور والغياب"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </TabItem.Header>
                        <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,*">
                            <!-- Month Selector -->
                            <Border Grid.Row="0" Classes="Card" Margin="0,0,0,8">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="12" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                                    <TextBlock Text="الشهر:" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                                    <ComboBox SelectedIndex="{Binding AttMonth}" Width="130">
                                        <ComboBoxItem>يناير</ComboBoxItem>
                                        <ComboBoxItem>فبراير</ComboBoxItem>
                                        <ComboBoxItem>مارس</ComboBoxItem>
                                        <ComboBoxItem>أبريل</ComboBoxItem>
                                        <ComboBoxItem>مايو</ComboBoxItem>
                                        <ComboBoxItem>يونيو</ComboBoxItem>
                                        <ComboBoxItem>يوليو</ComboBoxItem>
                                        <ComboBoxItem>أغسطس</ComboBoxItem>
                                        <ComboBoxItem>سبتمبر</ComboBoxItem>
                                        <ComboBoxItem>أكتوبر</ComboBoxItem>
                                        <ComboBoxItem>نوفمبر</ComboBoxItem>
                                        <ComboBoxItem>ديسمبر</ComboBoxItem>
                                    </ComboBox>
                                    <TextBlock Text="السنة:" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                                    <NumericUpDown Value="{Binding AttYear}" Minimum="2020" Maximum="2035" Width="90"/>
                                    <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding AddAttendanceCommand}">
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                                            <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Plus" Width="16"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="تسجيل حضور"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Button>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Border>
                            <!-- Stats -->
                            <Grid Grid.Row="1" ColumnDefinitions="*,*,*,*" Margin="0,0,0,8">
                                <Border Grid.Column="0" Background="#E8F5E9" CornerRadius="8" Padding="12,8" Margin="0,0,6,0">
                                    <StackPanel Spacing="2" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TotalPresent}" FontSize="22" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#2E7D32" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="حاضر" FontSize="12" Foreground="#2E7D32" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                                <Border Grid.Column="1" Background="#FFEBEE" CornerRadius="8" Padding="12,8" Margin="3,0">
                                    <StackPanel Spacing="2" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TotalAbsent}" FontSize="22" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#C62828" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="غائب" FontSize="12" Foreground="#C62828" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                                <Border Grid.Column="2" Background="#FFF8E1" CornerRadius="8" Padding="12,8" Margin="3,0">
                                    <StackPanel Spacing="2" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TotalLate}" FontSize="22" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#E65100" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="متأخر" FontSize="12" Foreground="#E65100" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                                <Border Grid.Column="3" Background="#E3F2FD" CornerRadius="8" Padding="12,8" Margin="6,0,0,0">
                                    <StackPanel Spacing="2" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TotalOnLeave}" FontSize="22" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#1565C0" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="في إجازة" FontSize="12" Foreground="#1565C0" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </Grid>
                            <!-- Attendance Table -->
                            <Border Grid.Row="2" Classes="Card" Padding="0">
                                <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding AttendanceRecords}"
                                          IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                                    <DataGrid.Columns>
                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="التاريخ" Binding="{Binding Date, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="120"/>
                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="الحالة" Binding="{Binding Status}" Width="100"/>
                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="وقت الحضور" Binding="{Binding CheckIn}" Width="120"/>
                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="وقت الانصراف" Binding="{Binding CheckOut}" Width="120"/>
                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="ساعات العمل" Binding="{Binding HoursWorked}" Width="100"/>
                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="نوع الإجازة" Binding="{Binding LeaveType}" Width="100"/>
                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="ملاحظات" Binding="{Binding Notes}" Width="*"/>
                                    </DataGrid.Columns>
                                </DataGrid>
                            </Border>
                        </Grid>
                    </TabItem>

                    <!-- ─ Tab 4: Leave Requests ─ -->
                    <TabItem>
                        <TabItem.Header>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Calendar" Width="16"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="طلبات الإجازة"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </TabItem.Header>
                        <Grid RowDefinitions="*,Auto">
                            <Border Grid.Row="0" Classes="Card" Padding="0">
                                <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding LeaveRequests}" IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                                    <DataGrid.Columns>
                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="الموظف" Binding="{Binding Employee.Name}" Width="*"/>
                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="النوع" Binding="{Binding LeaveType}" Width="100"/>
                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="من" Binding="{Binding StartDate, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="110"/>
                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="إلى" Binding="{Binding EndDate, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="110"/>
                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="الأيام" Binding="{Binding DaysCount}" Width="60"/>
                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="الحالة" Binding="{Binding Status}" Width="90"/>
                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="السبب" Binding="{Binding Reason}" Width="*"/>
                                    </DataGrid.Columns>
                                </DataGrid>
                            </Border>
                            <StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8" Margin="0,8,0,0">
                                <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding ApproveLeaveCommand}"
                                        IsEnabled="{Binding SelectedEmployee, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}">
                                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="CheckCircle" Width="16"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="موافقة"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Button>
                                <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding RejectLeaveCommand}"
                                        IsEnabled="{Binding SelectedEmployee, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}">
                                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="CloseCircle" Width="16"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="رفض"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Button>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Grid>
                    </TabItem>
                </TabControl>
            </Grid>
        </Grid>

        <!-- ══════ OVERLAYS ══════ -->

        <!-- ── Employee Form Overlay ── -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2" Background="#AA000000"
                IsVisible="{Binding IsEmployeeFormOpen}"
                HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Stretch">
            <Border Classes="Card" Width="700" MaxHeight="680"
                    VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                    <!-- Header -->
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}" CornerRadius="8,8,0,0"
                            Margin="-16,-16,-16,16" Padding="16,12">
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding FormTitle}" Foreground="White" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16"/>
                    </Border>
                    <!-- Fields -->
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1">
                        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,*" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto"
                              HorizontalAlignment="Stretch">
                            <!-- Row 0 -->
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="0" Margin="0,0,8,12">
                                <TextBlock Text="رقم الموظف" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding EmpNumber}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="0" Margin="8,0,0,12">
                                <TextBlock Text="الاسم الكامل *" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding EmpName}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <!-- Row 1 -->
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="1" Margin="0,0,8,12">
                                <TextBlock Text="الدور الوظيفي" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <ComboBox SelectedItem="{Binding EmpRole}" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch">
                                    <ComboBoxItem>Therapist</ComboBoxItem>
                                    <ComboBoxItem>Receptionist</ComboBoxItem>
                                    <ComboBoxItem>Admin</ComboBoxItem>
                                    <ComboBoxItem>Accountant</ComboBoxItem>
                                    <ComboBoxItem>Doctor</ComboBoxItem>
                                    <ComboBoxItem>Nurse</ComboBoxItem>
                                    <ComboBoxItem>Driver</ComboBoxItem>
                                    <ComboBoxItem>Other</ComboBoxItem>
                                </ComboBox>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="1" Margin="8,0,0,12">
                                <TextBlock Text="المسمى الوظيفي" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding EmpPosition}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <!-- Row 2 -->
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="2" Margin="0,0,8,12">
                                <TextBlock Text="القسم" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding EmpDepartment}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="2" Margin="8,0,0,12">
                                <TextBlock Text="رقم الهاتف" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding EmpPhone}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <!-- Row 3 -->
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="3" Margin="0,0,8,12">
                                <TextBlock Text="البريد الإلكتروني" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding EmpEmail}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="3" Margin="8,0,0,12">
                                <TextBlock Text="رقم الهوية" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding EmpNationalId}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <!-- Row 4 -->
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="4" Margin="0,0,8,12">

                    </Border>

                                </StackPanel>
                                <Border Grid.Column="1" Width="70" Height="70" CornerRadius="35"
                                        Background="White" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.Name[0]}"
                                               FontSize="30" FontWeight="Bold"
                                               Foreground="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}"
                                               HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                                </Border>
                            </Grid>
                        </Border>
                        <!-- Card Body -->
                        <Border Grid.Row="1" Background="White" Padding="24,16">
                            <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                                <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.Name}"
                                           FontSize="22" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#1A237E" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                                <TextBlock Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.Position}"
                                           FontSize="14" Foreground="#5C6BC0" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                                <Rectangle Grid.Row="2" Height="1" Fill="#E8EAF6" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                                <Grid Grid.Row="3" ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto" Margin="0,0,0,8">
                                    <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="0" Text="رقم الموظف:" Foreground="#9E9E9E" FontSize="12" Width="120" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                                    <TextBlock Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.EmployeeNumber}" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                                    <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="1" Text="القسم:" Foreground="#9E9E9E" FontSize="12" Width="120" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                                    <TextBlock Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.Department}" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                                    <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="2" Text="رقم الهوية:" Foreground="#9E9E9E" FontSize="12" Width="120" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                                    <TextBlock Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="2" Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.NationalId}" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                                    <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="3" Text="الهاتف:" Foreground="#9E9E9E" FontSize="12" Width="120"/>
                                    <TextBlock Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="3" Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.Phone}" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                </Grid>
                                <Rectangle Grid.Row="4" Height="1" Fill="#E8EAF6" Margin="0,8"/>
                                <StackPanel Grid.Row="5" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                    <TextBlock Text="تاريخ الالتحاق:" Foreground="#9E9E9E" FontSize="11"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEmployee.JoinDate, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" FontSize="11"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Grid>
                        </Border>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>

                <!-- Action Buttons -->
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="12">
                    <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding PrintIdCardCommand}" Width="150">
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                            <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Printer" Width="18"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="طباعة البطاقة"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Button>
                    <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding CancelCommand}" Width="110">
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                            <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="18"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="إغلاق"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Button>
                </StackPanel>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

    </Grid>
</UserControl>

---

## ✅ ما تم إضافته في صفحة HR

### 👤 إدارة الموظفين
- **نموذج تسجيل موظف كامل** يشمل: رقم الموظف، الاسم، الدور، المسمى الوظيفي، القسم، الهاتف، البريد، رقم الهوية، العنوان، جهة الاتصال الطارئة، الراتب الأساسي، تاريخ الالتحاق، وملاحظات
- **إرفاق مسار ملف العقد والسيرة الذاتية** مع زر فتحهما مباشرة
- **بحث سريع** بالاسم أو الرقم أو القسم أو الهوية

### 🪪 البطاقة التعريفية
- بطاقة موظف احترافية تظهر: الاسم، المسمى، القسم، رقم الموظف، رقم الهوية، الهاتف، تاريخ الالتحاق
- زر **طباعة البطاقة** جاهز

### 💰 الرواتب والأجور
- **كشف راتب شهري** لكل موظف يتضمن:
  - الراتب الأساسي
  - بدل سكن + بدل نقل + بدلات أخرى
  - الحوافز
  - الخصومات
  - أيام الغياب وخصمه
  - **الراتب الصافي** يُحسب تلقائياً
- **تأكيد صرف الراتب** مع حفظ تاريخ الصرف

### 📅 الحضور والغياب
- عرض شهري مع إحصائيات: **حاضر / غائب / متأخر / في إجازة**
- تسجيل سجلات الحضور

### 🗓️ طلبات الإجازة
- نموذج طلب إجازة (سنوية، مرضية، طارئة، بدون راتب، أمومة)
- أزرار موافقة ورفض

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.UserManagementView"
             x:CompileBindings="False">

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">

        <!-- ══ TOP BAR ══ -->
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="0" Margin="16,16,16,0">
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="إدارة المستخدمين والصلاحيات" Classes="Title" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                <Border Grid.Column="1" Background="{StaticResource SurfaceBrush}" CornerRadius="6"
                        BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="1"
                        Margin="12,0,8,0" Padding="8,0">
                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Grid.Column="0" Kind="Magnify" Width="18"
                                                    Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding SearchText}" Watermark="بحث بالاسم أو الدور..."
                                 Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0" Padding="0,4"/>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding AddUserCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AccountPlus" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="مستخدم جديد"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="3" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding EditUserCommand}" Margin="4,0"
                        IsEnabled="{Binding SelectedUser, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Pencil" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="تعديل"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="4" Command="{Binding ToggleActiveCommand}" Margin="4,0"
                        IsEnabled="{Binding SelectedUser, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AccountCheck" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="تفعيل / تعطيل"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="5" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding DeleteUserCommand}" Margin="4,0"
                        IsEnabled="{Binding SelectedUser, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AccountRemove" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="حذف"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- ══ CONTENT ══ -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1" ColumnDefinitions="*,340" Margin="16">

            <!-- ── Left: Users list + Network ── -->
            <Grid Grid.Column="0" RowDefinitions="*,Auto" Margin="0,0,8,0">

                <!-- Users Table -->
                <Border Grid.Row="0" Classes="Card" Padding="0">
                    <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Users}"
                              SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedUser}"
                              IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                        <DataGrid.Columns>
                            <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="المستخدم" Width="*">
                                <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate>
                                        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*" Margin="8,4">
                                            <Border Grid.Column="0" Width="36" Height="36" CornerRadius="18"
                                                    Background="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,10,0">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Username[0]}"
                                                           Foreground="White" HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                                                           VerticalAlignment="Center" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                                            </Border>
                                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" VerticalAlignment="Center" Spacing="2">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding FullName}" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="13"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Username}" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                        </Grid>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                            </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                            <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="الدور" Width="130">
                                <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate>
                                        <Border CornerRadius="4" Padding="8,3" Margin="4,6"
                                                Background="{StaticResource AccentBrush}">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Role}" Foreground="White" FontSize="12" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                        </Border>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                            </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="الهاتف" Binding="{Binding Phone}" Width="120"/>
                            <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="الشبكة" Width="80">
                                <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate>
                                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon
                                            Kind="{Binding RequireLanAccess, Converter={x:Static BoolConverters.IsTrue}, ConverterParameter='Wifi'}"
                                            Width="18" Margin="auto"
                                            Foreground="{StaticResource SuccessBrush}"/>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                            </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                            <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="الحالة" Width="90">
                                <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate>
                                        <Border CornerRadius="4" Padding="6,2" Margin="4,6">
                                            <Border.Background>
                                                <SolidColorBrush Color="#E8F5E9"/>
                                            </Border.Background>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding IsActive, StringFormat='{}{0}'}"
                                                       FontSize="11" Foreground="#2E7D32" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                        </Border>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                            </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="آخر دخول" Binding="{Binding LastLogin, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm}'}" Width="140"/>
                        </DataGrid.Columns>
                    </DataGrid>
                </Border>

                <!-- Network / WiFi Settings -->
                <Border Grid.Row="1" Classes="Card" Margin="0,8,0,0">
                    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto">
                        <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Wifi" Width="22" Foreground="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="إعداد قيد الشبكة (واي فاي)" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="15" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <!-- IP info -->
                        <Border Grid.Row="1" CornerRadius="8" Padding="12,8" Margin="0,0,0,10">
                            <Border.Background>
                                <SolidColorBrush Color="#E3F2FD"/>
                            </Border.Background>
                            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Grid.Column="0" Kind="InformationOutline" Width="18"
                                                            Foreground="#1565C0" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                                <TextBlock Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding LanStatusText}"
                                           Foreground="#1565C0" FontSize="12" TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
                            </Grid>
                        </Border>
                        <!-- Subnet setting -->
                        <Grid Grid.Row="2" ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto,Auto">
                            <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="نطاق الشبكة المسموح:" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                            <TextBox Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding AllowedSubnet}"
                                     Watermark="مثال: 192.168.1."
                                     VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                            <Button Grid.Column="2" Command="{Binding DetectSubnetCommand}" Margin="0,0,6,0"
                                    ToolTip.Tip="اكتشاف تلقائي من IP الجهاز الحالي">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AutoFix" Width="16"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="تلقائي"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>
                            <Button Grid.Column="3" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding SaveSubnetCommand}">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="16"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="حفظ"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>
                        </Grid>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>
            </Grid>

            <!-- ── Right: Role cards ── -->
            <Border Grid.Column="1" Classes="Card">
                <StackPanel Spacing="8">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8" Margin="0,0,0,8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ShieldAccount" Width="20" Foreground="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="الأدوار والصلاحيات" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="15"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Roles}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Classes="Card" Margin="0,0,0,6" Padding="12,10"
                                        CornerRadius="8">
                                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*">
                                        <Border Grid.Column="0" Width="38" Height="38" CornerRadius="19"
                                                Background="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,10,0"
                                                VerticalAlignment="Center">
                                            <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AccountCircle" Width="22"
                                                                         Foreground="White" HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                                        </Border>
                                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Spacing="2" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding DisplayName}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="13"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}"
                                                       Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                                                       FontSize="11" TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Grid>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </StackPanel>
            </Border>
        </Grid>

        <!-- ══ FORM OVERLAY ══ -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2" Background="#AA000000"
                IsVisible="{Binding IsFormOpen}" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Stretch">
            <Border Classes="Card" Width="620" MaxHeight="680"
                    VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                    <!-- Header -->
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}" CornerRadius="8,8,0,0"
                            Margin="-16,-16,-16,16" Padding="16,12">
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding FormTitle}" Foreground="White" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16"/>
                    </Border>

                    <!-- Fields -->
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1">
                        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,*" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                            <!-- Row 0: Username + Full Name -->
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="0" Margin="0,0,8,12">
                                <TextBlock Text="اسم المستخدم *" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding FUsername}" IsEnabled="{Binding !IsEditMode}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="0" Margin="8,0,0,12">
                                <TextBlock Text="الاسم الكامل" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding FFullName}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <!-- Row 1: Role selector -->
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="1" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                                <TextBlock Text="الدور الوظيفي *" Margin="0,0,0,6" FontSize="12"/>
                                <ListBox ItemsSource="{Binding Roles}"
                                         SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedRoleInfo}"
                                         SelectionMode="Single">
                                    <ListBox.ItemsPanel>
                                        <ItemsPanelTemplate>
                                            <WrapPanel/>
                                        </ItemsPanelTemplate>
                                    </ListBox.ItemsPanel>
                                    <ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                                        <DataTemplate>
                                            <Border Padding="10,6" CornerRadius="6" Margin="3">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding DisplayName}" FontSize="12"/>
                                            </Border>
                                        </DataTemplate>
                                    </ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                                </ListBox>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <!-- Row 2: Phone + Email -->
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="2" Margin="0,0,8,12">
                                <TextBlock Text="الهاتف" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding FPhone}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="2" Margin="8,0,0,12">
                                <TextBlock Text="البريد الإلكتروني" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding FEmail}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <!-- Row 3: Password -->
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="3" Margin="0,0,8,12">
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding IsEditMode, StringFormat={}كلمة المرور (اتركها فارغة لعدم التغيير)}"
                                           Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding FPassword}" PasswordChar="•"
                                         Watermark="••••••••"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="3" Margin="8,0,0,12">
                                <TextBlock Text="تأكيد كلمة المرور" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding FPasswordConfirm}" PasswordChar="•"
                                         Watermark="••••••••"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <!-- Row 4: LAN + Active -->
                            <Border Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="4"
                                    Background="#E3F2FD" CornerRadius="8" Padding="12,10" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                                <StackPanel Spacing="8">
                                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Wifi" Width="18" Foreground="#1565C0"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="إعدادات الوصول عبر الشبكة" FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="#1565C0"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="12">
                                        <CheckBox IsChecked="{Binding FRequireLan}" Content="اشتراط الاتصال بنفس شبكة الواي فاي" FontSize="13"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="12">
                                        <CheckBox IsChecked="{Binding FIsActive}" Content="الحساب فعّال" FontSize="13"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Border>
                            <!-- Row 5: Notes -->
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="5" Margin="0,0,0,0">
                                <TextBlock Text="ملاحظات" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding FNotes}" Height="60" TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Grid>
                    </ScrollViewer>

                    <!-- Buttons -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="12" Margin="0,16,0,0">
                        <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding SaveUserCommand}" Width="150">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="18"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="حفظ المستخدم"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding CancelCommand}" Width="100">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="18"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="إلغاء"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Border>

    </Grid>
</UserControl>
