<Window xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
        xmlns:views="using:RehabCenterApp.Views"
        xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
        x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.MainWindow"
        x:CompileBindings="False"
        Title="{Binding L[AppTitle]}"
        Width="1600" Height="1000"
        MinWidth="1200" MinHeight="800"
        FlowDirection="{Binding L.FlowDir}"
        Background="{StaticResource BackgroundBrush}">

    <SplitView IsPaneOpen="{Binding IsPaneOpen}"
               DisplayMode="CompactInline"
               OpenPaneLength="300"
               CompactPaneLength="56">
        <SplitView.Pane>
            <Border Background="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,*,Auto">

                    <!-- Toggle button -->
                    <Button Grid.Row="0"
                            Command="{Binding TogglePaneCommand}"
                            Background="Transparent"
                            HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                            HorizontalContentAlignment="Center"
                            Padding="16">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Menu" Width="24" Height="24" Foreground="White"/>
                    </Button>

                    <!-- Current user info -->
                    <Border Grid.Row="1" Padding="12,8" Margin="6,0,6,6"
                            Background="#00000030" CornerRadius="8"
                            IsVisible="{Binding IsPaneOpen}">
                        <StackPanel Spacing="2">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <Border Width="32" Height="32" CornerRadius="16" Background="#ffffff30">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AccountCircle" Width="20" Foreground="White"
                                                                HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                                </Border>
                                <StackPanel VerticalAlignment="Center" Spacing="1">
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding CurrentUserName}" Foreground="White" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="13"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding CurrentUserRole}" Foreground="#ffffff80" FontSize="11"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Border>

                    <!-- Navigation -->
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="2">
                        <StackPanel Spacing="1" Margin="0,4">

                            <!-- ══ Core Operations ══ -->
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavCoreOps]}" Foreground="#ffffff80" FontSize="10"
                                       Margin="16,8,0,4" IsVisible="{Binding IsPaneOpen}"/>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToDashboardCommand}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ViewDashboard" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavDashboard]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToBeneficiariesCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeBeneficiaries}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AccountGroup" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavBeneficiaries]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToWaitingListCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeWaitingList}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ClipboardList" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavWaitingList]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToSessionsCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeSessions}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="CalendarCheck" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavSessions]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToTelehealthCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeTelehealth}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Video" Width="22" Foreground="#48bb78"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavTelehealth]}" Foreground="#48bb78" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <!-- ══ Clinical ══ -->
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavClinical]}" Foreground="#ffffff80" FontSize="10"
                                       Margin="16,12,0,4" IsVisible="{Binding IsPaneOpen}"
                                       IsVisible2="{Binding CanSeeAssessments}"/>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToAssessmentsCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeAssessments}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ChartBar" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavAssessments]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToInterventionPlansCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeInterventionPlans}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ClipboardText" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavInterventionPlans]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToClinicalReportsCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeClinicalReports}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileCertificate" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavClinicalReports]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToMDTMeetingsCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeMDT}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AccountMultiple" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavMDT]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToGamificationCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeGamification}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Trophy" Width="22" Foreground="#ed8936"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavGamification]}" Foreground="#ed8936" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <!-- ══ Financial ══ -->
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavFinancial]}" Foreground="#ffffff80" FontSize="10"
                                       Margin="16,12,0,4" IsVisible="{Binding IsPaneOpen}"/>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToAccountingCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeAccounting}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="CashRegister" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavAccounting]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToInventoryCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeInventory}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="PackageVariant" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavInventory]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToHRManagementCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeHR}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AccountTie" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavHR]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <!-- ══ Communication ══ -->
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavCommunication]}" Foreground="#ffffff80" FontSize="10"
                                       Margin="16,12,0,4" IsVisible="{Binding IsPaneOpen}"/>

                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Email" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavCorrespondence]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToParentPortalCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeParentPortal}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="MessageText" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavParentPortal]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToRemindersCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeReminders}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="BellRing" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavReminders]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToDocumentArchiveCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeDocuments}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Archive" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavDocuments]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <!-- ══ Reports ══ -->
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavReports]}" Foreground="#ffffff80" FontSize="10"
                                       Margin="16,12,0,4" IsVisible="{Binding IsPaneOpen}"/>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToAnalyticsCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeAnalytics}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ChartAreaspline" Width="22" Foreground="#48bb78"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavAnalytics]}" Foreground="#48bb78" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToGovernmentReportsCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeGovernmentReports}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileDocumentCheck" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavGovernmentReports]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToFormsCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeForms}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileDocument" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavForms]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <!-- ══ Admin ══ -->
                            <Separator Margin="8,8" Background="#ffffff30"/>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToUserManagementCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeUserManagement}"
                                    Background="#ffffff15" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AccountKey" Width="22" Foreground="#fbd38d"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="إدارة المستخدمين" Foreground="#fbd38d" FontSize="13" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <Button Command="{Binding NavigateToSettingsCommand}"
                                    IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeSettings}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Cog" Width="22" Foreground="White"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavSettings]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="13"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>

                            <Button Command="{Binding ToggleLanguageCommand}"
                                    Background="Transparent" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                    HorizontalContentAlignment="Left" Padding="16,10">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="14">

- [Replit build fixes](replit-build-fixes.md) — key fixes needed to compile/run this Windows Avalonia app on Linux/Replit
- [Role-based user system](role-based-user-system.md) — how roles, nav visibility, LAN check, and UserSessionService are wired together

---
name: Role-based user system
description: How roles, nav visibility, LAN/WiFi check, and UserSessionService are wired together in this Avalonia app
---

## Roles defined
Admin, Therapist, Receptionist, Accountant, HR, PR (علاقات عامة)

## Key files
- `Services/UserSessionService.cs` — singleton; holds logged-in user, exposes CanSeeXxx booleans per section
- `Models/User.cs` — has FullName, Phone, Email, RequireLanAccess, Notes (added)
- `ViewModels/LoginViewModel.cs` — LAN check applies to ALL non-Admin roles (not just Therapist); routes: Admin→MainWindow, Therapist→TherapistWindow, others→MainWindow with role-filtered nav
- `ViewModels/MainWindowViewModel.cs` — exposes CanSeeXxx properties bound from UserSessionService; has NavigateToUserManagementCommand
- `Views/MainWindow.axaml` — uses x:CompileBindings="False"; every nav button has IsVisible="{Binding CanSeeXxx}"
- `ViewModels/UserManagementViewModel.cs` — CRUD for users + LAN subnet config (auto-detect + manual)
- `Views/UserManagementView.axaml` — user list, add/edit form overlay, WiFi subnet settings panel
- `Services/NavigationService.cs` — includes UserManagementViewModel
- `App.axaml.cs` — routes login result to correct window; registers UserManagementViewModel as Singleton

## Role → sections mapping
Admin: everything + UserManagement + Settings
Therapist: TherapistWindow (separate, own sessions only)
Receptionist: Dashboard, Beneficiaries, WaitingList, Sessions, Telehealth, Correspondence, ParentPortal, Reminders, Forms
Accountant: Dashboard, Accounting, Inventory, HR (view), Analytics, GovernmentReports
HR: Dashboard, HRManagement
PR: Dashboard, Beneficiaries, Correspondence, ParentPortal, Reminders, Documents, Forms

## LAN/WiFi check
- AllowedSubnet stored in AppSettings DB key (default "192.168.")
- LanAccessService.IsAllowedAccess() checks local IPs start with that prefix
- Applied to ALL non-Admin roles on login if user.RequireLanAccess == true
- Admin can set subnet manually or auto-detect from own IP in UserManagement page

## Why
- MainWindow uses x:CompileBindings="False" to avoid AVLN3000 errors with MaterialIcon string Kind bindings
- UserSessionService is a singleton (not DI-registered) — accessed via Instance property — avoids circular DI

## ✅ ما تم بناؤه: نظام إدارة المستخدمين والصلاحيات

### 👥 صفحة إدارة المستخدمين (للأدمن فقط)
- **قائمة بجميع المستخدمين** مع صورة رمزية، اسم كامل، اسم مستخدم، الدور
- **إضافة مستخدم جديد** مع كل البيانات (اسم، دور، هاتف، بريد، كلمة مرور)
- **تعديل أي مستخدم** بما في ذلك تغيير كلمة المرور
- **تفعيل / تعطيل** الحسابات مع حماية حساب الأدمن الرئيسي
- **حذف مستخدم** مع تأكيد

### 🌐 إعداد شبكة الواي فاي
- **اكتشاف تلقائي**: زر "تلقائي" يكتشف نطاق الشبكة من IP جهازك الحالي مباشرةً
- **ضبط يدوي**: تكتب النطاق يدوياً مثل `192.168.1.`
- **حفظ الإعداد** في قاعدة البيانات ويُطبَّق على جميع الجلسات

### 🔐 قيد الواي فاي عند تسجيل الدخول
| الدور | قيد الشبكة |
|-------|-----------|
| **Admin** | ❌ لا قيد — يدخل من أي مكان |
| **أخصائي** | ✅ يجب نفس الواي فاي |
| **محاسب** | ✅ يجب نفس الواي فاي |
| **HR** | ✅ يجب نفس الواي فاي |
| **علاقات عامة** | ✅ يجب نفس الواي فاي |
| **استقبال** | ✅ يجب نفس الواي فاي |

> يمكنك تعطيل القيد لمستخدم معين عبر تبطيل خيار "اشتراط الاتصال بنفس شبكة الواي فاي" في بيانات المستخدم

### 🖥️ لوحة تحكم مخصصة لكل دور

| الدور | ما يراه في القائمة الجانبية |
|-------|--------------------------|
| **Admin** | كل شيء + إدارة المستخدمين + الإعدادات |
| **أخصائي** | بوابة الأخصائي المستقلة (جلساته وتقاريره فقط) |
| **محاسب** | الرئيسية، المحاسبة، المخزون، HR (الرواتب)، التحليلات، التقارير الحكومية |
| **موارد بشرية** | الرئيسية، إدارة الموظفين |
| **علاقات عامة** | الرئيسية، المستفيدون، المراسلات، بوابة الأولياء، التذكيرات، الأرشيف، النماذج |
| **استقبال** | الرئيسية، المستفيدون، قائمة الانتظار، الجلسات، التليهيلث، المراسلات، التذكيرات، النماذج |

### 👤 اسم المستخدم في الشريط الجانبي
- يظهر اسم المستخدم الكامل ودوره الوظيفي في أعلى القائمة الجانبية بعد تسجيل الدخول

                        <Border Background="#ffffff20" CornerRadius="6" Padding="10,4">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ChartBar" Width="14" Foreground="White"/>
                                <TextBlock Foreground="White" FontSize="12">
                                    <Run Text="التقييمات: "/><Run Text="{Binding TotalAssessments}"/>
                                </TextBlock>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>
                        <Border Background="#ffffff20" CornerRadius="6" Padding="10,4">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ClipboardText" Width="14" Foreground="White"/>
                                <TextBlock Foreground="White" FontSize="12">
                                    <Run Text="الخطط: "/><Run Text="{Binding ActivePlans}"/>
                                </TextBlock>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>
                        <Border Background="#ffffff20" CornerRadius="6" Padding="10,4">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="TrendingUp" Width="14" Foreground="#48bb78"/>
                                <TextBlock Foreground="#48bb78" FontSize="12">
                                    <Run Text="متوسط الإتقان: "/><Run Text="{Binding AvgMastery}"/><Run Text="%"/>
                                </TextBlock>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- Close button -->
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Command="{Binding CloseCommand}"
                        Background="#ffffff20" CornerRadius="20"
                        Width="40" Height="40" Padding="0" VerticalAlignment="Top">
                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="20" Foreground="White"/>
                </Button>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- ══ TABS ══ -->
        <TabControl Grid.Row="1" SelectedIndex="{Binding TabIndex}">

            <!-- ─ Tab 1: البيانات الأساسية ─ -->
            <TabItem Header="البيانات الأساسية">
                <ScrollViewer Padding="16">
                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,*" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">

                        <!-- Section: بيانات الطالب -->
                        <Border Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="0"
                                Background="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}" CornerRadius="6" Padding="10,6" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Account" Width="16" Foreground="White"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="بيانات الطالب" Foreground="White" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>

                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="1" Margin="0,0,8,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="الاسم الكامل *" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding Name}"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="1" Margin="8,0,0,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="تاريخ الميلاد" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <DatePicker SelectedDate="{Binding DateOfBirth}"/>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="2" Margin="0,0,8,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="الجنس" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <ComboBox SelectedItem="{Binding Gender}">
                                <ComboBoxItem>ذكر</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>أنثى</ComboBoxItem>
                            </ComboBox>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="2" Margin="8,0,0,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="رقم الهوية" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding NationalId}"/>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="3" Margin="0,0,8,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="نوع الإعاقة" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <ComboBox SelectedItem="{Binding DisabilityType}">
                                <ComboBoxItem>إعاقة حركية</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>إعاقة ذهنية</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>إعاقة سمعية</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>إعاقة بصرية</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>توحد</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>متلازمة داون</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>شلل دماغي</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>أخرى</ComboBoxItem>
                            </ComboBox>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="3" Margin="8,0,0,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="الهاتف" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding Phone}"/>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="4" Margin="0,0,0,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="العنوان" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding Address}"/>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="5" Margin="0,0,8,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="المدرسة / المؤسسة" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding SchoolName}"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="5" Margin="8,0,0,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="جهة الإحالة" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding ReferralSource}"/>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="6" Margin="0,0,8,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="الحالة" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <ComboBox SelectedItem="{Binding Status}">
                                <ComboBoxItem>Active</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>Inactive</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>Graduated</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>Transferred</ComboBoxItem>
                            </ComboBox>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <!-- Section: بيانات ولي الأمر -->
                        <Border Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="7"
                                Background="{StaticResource AccentBrush}" CornerRadius="6" Padding="10,6" Margin="0,8,0,12">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AccountSupervisor" Width="16" Foreground="White"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="بيانات ولي الأمر" Foreground="White" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>

                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="8" Margin="0,0,8,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="اسم ولي الأمر" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding GuardianName}"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="8" Margin="8,0,0,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="صفة ولي الأمر" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <ComboBox SelectedItem="{Binding GuardianRelation}">
                                <ComboBoxItem>أب</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>أم</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>أخ</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>أخت</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>جد</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>جدة</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>كفيل</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>أخرى</ComboBoxItem>
                            </ComboBox>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="9" Margin="0,0,8,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="هاتف ولي الأمر" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding GuardianPhone}"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="9" Margin="8,0,0,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="هاتف الطوارئ" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding EmergencyPhone}"/>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="10" Margin="0,0,8,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="البريد الإلكتروني" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding GuardianEmail}"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="10" Margin="8,0,0,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="رقم هوية ولي الأمر" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding Beneficiary.GuardianNationalId}"/>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <!-- Save button -->
                        <Button Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="11"
                                Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding SaveBasicInfoCommand}"
                                HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,12,0,0" Width="200">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="18"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="حفظ البيانات الأساسية"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </Grid>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- ─ Tab 2: التشخيص الطبي ─ -->
            <TabItem Header="التشخيص الطبي">
                <ScrollViewer Padding="16">
                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,*" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">

                        <Border Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="0"
                                Background="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}" CornerRadius="6" Padding="10,6" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Stethoscope" Width="16" Foreground="White"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="المعلومات الطبية والتشخيصية" Foreground="White" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>

                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="1" Margin="0,0,0,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="التشخيص الرئيسي" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding Diagnosis}" Height="70" TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="2" Margin="0,0,0,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="التشخيص الثانوي" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding SecondaryDiagnosis}" Height="70" TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="3" Margin="0,0,0,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="التاريخ الطبي" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding MedicalHistory}" Height="90" TextWrapping="Wrap"
                                     Watermark="السوابق المرضية، العمليات، الحوادث..."/>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="4" Margin="0,0,8,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="الحساسيات" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding Allergies}" Watermark="الأدوية، الغذاء..."/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="4" Margin="8,0,0,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="فصيلة الدم" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <ComboBox SelectedItem="{Binding BloodType}">
                                <ComboBoxItem>A+</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>A-</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>B+</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>B-</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>AB+</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>AB-</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>O+</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>O-</ComboBoxItem>
                            </ComboBox>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="5" Margin="0,0,0,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="الأدوية الحالية" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding CurrentMedications}" Height="70" TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="6" Margin="0,0,0,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="المستوى الوظيفي الحالي" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding FunctionalLevel}" Height="70" TextWrapping="Wrap"
                                     Watermark="وصف للقدرات الحالية والمستوى العام للطالب..."/>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="7" Margin="0,0,8,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="شركة التأمين" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding InsuranceCompany}"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="7" Margin="8,0,0,10">
                            <TextBlock Text="رقم التأمين" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Text="{Binding InsuranceNumber}"/>
                        </StackPanel>

                        <Button Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="8"
                                Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding SaveMedicalCommand}"
                                HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,12,0,0" Width="220">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="18"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="حفظ المعلومات الطبية"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </Grid>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- ─ Tab 3: المرفقات ─ -->
            <TabItem Header="المرفقات والوثائق">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*" Margin="16">

                    <Button Grid.Row="0" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding AddAttachmentCommand}"
                            Margin="0,0,0,12" HorizontalAlignment="Left">
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                            <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="PaperclipPlus" Width="18"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="إرفاق ملف أو صورة"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Button>

                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1">
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Attachments}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Classes="Card" Margin="0,0,0,8" Padding="12,10">
                                        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto,Auto">
                                            <!-- Icon by type -->
                                            <Border Grid.Column="0" Width="42" Height="42" CornerRadius="8"
                                                    Background="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,12,0">
                                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileDocument" Width="22"
                                                                             Foreground="White" HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                                            </Border>
                                            <!-- Info -->
                                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" VerticalAlignment="Center" Spacing="2">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding FileName}" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="13"/>
                                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="12">
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding AttachmentType}" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding UploadDate, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding AddedByUser}" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                                </StackPanel>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Notes}" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"
                                                           IsVisible="{Binding Notes, Converter={x:Static StringConverters.IsNotNullOrEmpty}}"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <!-- Open -->
                                            <Button Grid.Column="2" Command="{Binding $parent[ItemsControl].DataContext.OpenAttachmentCommand}"
                                                    CommandParameter="{Binding}"
                                                    Background="{StaticResource SuccessBrush}" CornerRadius="6"
                                                    Padding="8,4" Margin="8,0,4,0">
                                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="OpenInNew" Width="16" Foreground="White"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="فتح" Foreground="White" FontSize="12"/>
                                                </StackPanel>
                                            </Button>
                                            <!-- Delete -->
                                            <Button Grid.Column="3" Command="{Binding $parent[ItemsControl].DataContext.DeleteAttachmentCommand}"
                                                    CommandParameter="{Binding}"
                                                    Background="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}" CornerRadius="6"
                                                    Padding="8,4">
                                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Delete" Width="16" Foreground="White"/>
                                            </Button>
                                        </Grid>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- ─ Tab 4: الخطط التأهلية ─ -->
            <TabItem Header="الخطط التأهلية">
                <ScrollViewer Margin="16">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Plans}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Classes="Card" Margin="0,0,0,10">
                                    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto">
                                        <!-- Plan header -->
                                        <Grid Grid.Row="0" ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto" Margin="0,0,0,8">
                                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Spacing="2">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding PlanTitle}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="15"/>
                                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="10">
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding StartDate, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="→" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding EndDate, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                                </StackPanel>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <Border Grid.Column="1" CornerRadius="4" Padding="10,4"
                                                    Background="{StaticResource AccentBrush}">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Status}" Foreground="White" FontSize="12"/>
                                            </Border>
                                        </Grid>
                                        <!-- Long term goals -->
                                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding LongTermGoals}"
                                                   Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                                                   TextWrapping="Wrap" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>
                                        <!-- Objectives -->
                                        <ItemsControl Grid.Row="2" ItemsSource="{Binding Objectives}">
                                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                                <DataTemplate>
                                                    <Border Background="{StaticResource SurfaceBrush}" CornerRadius="6"
                                                            Padding="10,8" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                                        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto,Auto">
                                                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Spacing="2">
                                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ObjectiveText}" FontSize="12" TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
                                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Domain}" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="10"/>
                                                            </StackPanel>
                                                            <TextBlock Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding Status}" FontSize="11"
                                                                       Foreground="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}" Margin="8,0"/>
                                                            <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" FontSize="11" Foreground="{StaticResource SuccessBrush}">
                                                                <Run Text="الهدف: "/><Run Text="{Binding Target}"/><Run Text="%"/>
                                                            </TextBlock>
                                                        </Grid>
                                                    </Border>
                                                </DataTemplate>
                                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                        </ItemsControl>
                                    </Grid>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- ─ Tab 5: السجل التاريخي ─ -->
            <TabItem Header="السجل التاريخي">
                <ScrollViewer Margin="16">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding History}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,Auto,*" Margin="0,0,0,0">
                                    <!-- Timeline line -->
                                    <Border Grid.Column="0" Width="2" Background="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"
                                            Margin="19,0,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"/>

                                    <!-- Timeline dot -->
                                    <Border Grid.Column="1" Width="38" Height="38" CornerRadius="19"
                                            Margin="-20,8,10,8" VerticalAlignment="Top">
                                        <Border.Background>
                                            <SolidColorBrush Color="#4299e1"/>
                                        </Border.Background>
                                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="{Binding TypeIcon}" Width="18"
                                                                     Foreground="White"
                                                                     HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                                    </Border>

                                    <!-- Entry card -->
                                    <Border Grid.Column="2" Classes="Card" Margin="0,4,0,4" Padding="14,10">
                                        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto">
                                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                                <Border CornerRadius="4" Padding="6,2">
                                                    <Border.Background>
                                                        <SolidColorBrush Color="#E3F2FD"/>
                                                    </Border.Background>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding EntryType}" FontSize="11" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#1565C0"/>
                                                </Border>
                                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="4">
                                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AccountOutline" Width="12" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding TherapistName}" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="12"/>
                                                </StackPanel>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <TextBlock Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding DateFormatted}"
                                                       Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>

                                            <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="1"
                                                       Text="{Binding Summary}" TextWrapping="Wrap"
                                                       FontSize="12" Margin="0,6,0,0"/>

                                            <!-- Mastery -->
                                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="2"
                                                        Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8" Margin="0,6,0,0"
                                                        IsVisible="{Binding MasteryPercent, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}">
                                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="TrendingUp" Width="14" Foreground="{StaticResource SuccessBrush}"/>
                                                <TextBlock Foreground="{StaticResource SuccessBrush}" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold">
                                                    <Run Text="نسبة الإتقان: "/><Run Text="{Binding MasteryPercent}"/><Run Text="%"/>
                                                </TextBlock>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                        </Grid>
                                    </Border>
                                </Grid>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

        </TabControl>

        <!-- ══ FOOTER ══ -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" Classes="Card" CornerRadius="0">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Right" Spacing="8">
                <Button Command="{Binding CloseCommand}">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="16"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="إغلاق الملف"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:views="using:RehabCenterApp.Views"
             xmlns:converters="using:RehabCenterApp.Converters"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.BeneficiariesView"
             x:CompileBindings="False">

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">

        <!-- ══ TOP BAR ══ -->
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="0" Margin="16,16,16,0">
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                <Border Grid.Column="0" Background="{StaticResource SurfaceBrush}" CornerRadius="6"
                        BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="1"
                        Margin="0,0,8,0" Padding="8,0">
                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Grid.Column="0" Kind="Magnify" Width="18"
                                                    Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding SearchQuery, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                 Watermark="بحث بالاسم أو الهاتف أو رقم الهوية..."
                                 Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0" Padding="0,4"/>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>

                <Button Grid.Column="1" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding AddCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Plus" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="إضافة جديد"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>

                <!-- ★ Full profile card button -->
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Command="{Binding OpenProfileCommand}" Margin="4,0"
                        IsEnabled="{Binding SelectedBeneficiary, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="CardAccountDetails" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="الملف الكامل"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>

                <Button Grid.Column="3" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding EditCommand}" Margin="4,0"
                        IsEnabled="{Binding SelectedBeneficiary, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Pencil" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="تعديل سريع"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>

                <Button Grid.Column="4" Classes="Danger" Command="{Binding DeleteCommand}" Margin="4,0"
                        IsEnabled="{Binding SelectedBeneficiary, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Delete" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="حذف"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>

                <Button Grid.Column="5" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding ExportToExcelCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileExcel" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="Excel"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- ══ BENEFICIARIES TABLE ══ -->
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="1" Margin="16" Padding="0">
            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Beneficiaries}"
                      SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedBeneficiary}"
                      IsReadOnly="True"
                      AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                <DataGrid.Columns>
                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="المستفيد" Width="220">
                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*" Margin="8,4">
                                    <Border Grid.Column="0" Width="36" Height="36" CornerRadius="18"
                                            Background="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,10,0">
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding Name[0]}"
                                                   Foreground="White" HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                                                   VerticalAlignment="Center" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                                    </Border>
                                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" VerticalAlignment="Center" Spacing="2">
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding Name}" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="13"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding NationalId}" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontSize="11"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Grid>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="العمر" Binding="{Binding Age}" Width="60"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الجنس" Binding="{Binding Gender}" Width="70"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="نوع الإعاقة" Binding="{Binding DisabilityType}" Width="150"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الجوال" Binding="{Binding Phone}" Width="120"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="ولي الأمر" Binding="{Binding GuardianName}" Width="130"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="آخر جلسة" Binding="{Binding LastSession.Date, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="110"/>
                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="الحالة" Width="90">
                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border CornerRadius="4" Padding="6,2" Margin="4,6"
                                        Background="{StaticResource AccentBrush}">
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Status}" Foreground="White" FontSize="11"
                                               HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                </DataGrid.Columns>
            </DataGrid>
        </Border>

        <!-- ══ QUICK ADD/EDIT FORM OVERLAY ══ -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                Background="#AA000000"
                IsVisible="{Binding IsFormOpen}"
                HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                VerticalAlignment="Stretch">
            <Border Classes="Card"
                    Width="640"
                    MaxHeight="720"
                    VerticalAlignment="Center"
                    HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                    <!-- Header -->
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}" CornerRadius="8,8,0,0"
                            Margin="-16,-16,-16,16" Padding="16,12">
                        <TextBlock x:CompileBindings="False"
                                   Text="{Binding FormViewModel.IsEditing, Converter={x:Static converters:BoolToStringConverter.Instance}, ConverterParameter='تعديل بيانات مستفيد|إضافة مستفيد جديد'}"
                                   Foreground="White" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16"/>
                    </Border>

                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1">
                        <Grid x:CompileBindings="False" DataContext="{Binding FormViewModel}"
                              ColumnDefinitions="*,*" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">

                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="0" Margin="0,0,8,10">
                                <TextBlock Text="الاسم الكامل *" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding Name}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="0" Margin="8,0,0,10">
                                <TextBlock Text="تاريخ الميلاد" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <DatePicker SelectedDate="{Binding DateOfBirth}"/>
                            </StackPanel>

                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="1" Margin="0,0,8,10">
                                <TextBlock Text="الجنس" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <ComboBox SelectedItem="{Binding Gender}">
                                    <ComboBoxItem>ذكر</ComboBoxItem>
                                    <ComboBoxItem>أنثى</ComboBoxItem>
                                </ComboBox>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="1" Margin="8,0,0,10">
                                <TextBlock Text="رقم الهوية" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding NationalId}"/>
                            </StackPanel>

                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="2" Margin="0,0,8,10">
                                <TextBlock Text="نوع الإعاقة" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <ComboBox SelectedItem="{Binding DisabilityType}">
                                    <ComboBoxItem>إعاقة حركية</ComboBoxItem>
                                    <ComboBoxItem>إعاقة ذهنية</ComboBoxItem>
                                    <ComboBoxItem>إعاقة سمعية</ComboBoxItem>
                                    <ComboBoxItem>إعاقة بصرية</ComboBoxItem>
                                    <ComboBoxItem>توحد</ComboBoxItem>
                                    <ComboBoxItem>متلازمة داون</ComboBoxItem>
                                    <ComboBoxItem>شلل دماغي</ComboBoxItem>
                                    <ComboBoxItem>أخرى</ComboBoxItem>
                                </ComboBox>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="2" Margin="8,0,0,10">
                                <TextBlock Text="الهاتف" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding Phone}"/>
                            </StackPanel>

                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="3" Margin="0,0,0,10">
                                <TextBlock Text="التشخيص" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding Diagnosis}" Height="60" TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
                            </StackPanel>

                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="4" Margin="0,0,0,10">
                                <TextBlock Text="العنوان" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding Address}"/>
                            </StackPanel>

                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="5" Margin="0,0,8,10">
                                <TextBlock Text="اسم ولي الأمر" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding GuardianName}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="5" Margin="8,0,0,10">
                                <TextBlock Text="هاتف ولي الأمر" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding GuardianPhone}"/>
                            </StackPanel>

                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="6" Margin="0,0,8,10">
                                <TextBlock Text="شركة التأمين" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding InsuranceCompany}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="6" Margin="8,0,0,10">
                                <TextBlock Text="رقم التأمين" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding InsuranceNumber}"/>
                            </StackPanel>

                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="7" Margin="0,0,8,10">
                                <TextBlock Text="الحالة" Margin="0,0,0,4" FontSize="12"/>
                                <ComboBox SelectedItem="{Binding Status}">
                                    <ComboBoxItem>Active</ComboBoxItem>
                                    <ComboBoxItem>Inactive</ComboBoxItem>
                                    <ComboBoxItem>Graduated</ComboBoxItem>
                                </ComboBox>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Grid>
                    </ScrollViewer>

                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="12" Margin="0,16,0,0">
                        <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding FormViewModel.SaveCommand, FallbackValue={x:Null}}" Width="150">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="18"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="حفظ"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding CloseFormCommand}" Width="100">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="18"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="إلغاء"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Border>

        <!-- ══ FULL PROFILE OVERLAY ══ -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                Background="#CC000000"
                IsVisible="{Binding IsProfileOpen}"
                HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                VerticalAlignment="Stretch">
            <Border Classes="Card"
                    MaxWidth="1100" MaxHeight="860"
                    Width="1060"
                    VerticalAlignment="Center"
                    HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                    Padding="0">
                <ContentControl Content="{Binding ProfileViewModel}">
                    <ContentControl.DataTemplates>
                        <DataTemplate DataType="vm:BeneficiaryProfileViewModel">
                            <views:BeneficiaryProfileView/>
                        </DataTemplate>
                    </ContentControl.DataTemplates>
                </ContentControl>
            </Border>
        </Border>

    </Grid>
</UserControl>
